name: Password Guessing - Multiple Failed Logons Against Single Account
description: Detects password guessing by identifying excessive failed logon attempts (4625) against a single account from a single source. Covers RDP, SMB, WinRM, and SSH brute force.
query: event.code: "4625" and winlog.event_data.Status: ("0xC000006D" or "0xC000006A") and not winlog.event_data.TargetUserName: (SYSTEM or "LOCAL SERVICE" or "NETWORK SERVICE")
